technologies.name: AWS
technologies.evidence: The customer transitioned from an on-prem environment to the AWS Cloud to address these challenges.

technologies.name: Terraform
technologies.evidence: All environments (Dev, Test, Prod) were provisioned using Terraform templates, ensuring repeatability, compliance, and zero manual console changes.
technologies.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions Terraform as the tool used for infrastructure automation.

technologies.name: Nagios

technologies.name: PNP4Nagios
